sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the red box now shows: O, p, [empty with green border], R
The empty slot now has a green border around it (it was selected). The R is still in slot 4. It seems like clicking the empty slot and then R didn't move R into the empty slot - it just selected the empty slot.
Let me check the current state more carefully. Maybe I need to click R first, then the empty slot.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Color blocks:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 16 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'W', 'g', 'G', 'c']:
        b = n['boundary'][0]
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pos={str(b)}")
    elif n['pixels'] == 16 and n['color'] == 'c':
        b = n['boundary'][0]
        print(f"  color={n['color']} (charcoal/empty) pos={str(b)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
